title: Widget Chart - Bell Curve or Box Plot

posts.author: gcwozniak (Garrett)
posts.cookedHtml:
Just to be able to visualize number and formula columns in a bell curve format.

eg:

  • we calculate average time to complete a business request. We can get an average easily enough, but what about a bell curve or box plot?
  • we have sales amounts
  • etc

posts.author: pecour (Peter Courouble)
posts.cookedHtml:
It would be great to have a boxplot chart with the following values:

  • Outlier
  • Median
  • Average
  • 25% / 75% Quartile
  • Min value

Use Cases: Ticketing, work boards: Tracking of time spent on a ticket
